name: Paulo Cordoba
bio: I discovered my passion for technology at ITSIM High School in Pasto, during an elective computer science class where I saw an Adobe Flash animation for the first time. I was amazed. From that moment, I knew I wanted to dedicate my life to building things with code. I pursued Software Engineering with that same excitement, and later a Specialization in Software Construction, but my hunger for learning remains intact, just like the first day.

Today, with over 8 years of experience as a backend developer, I've traveled a path from C# and Java to finding my true passion: Python. I deeply enjoy its elegance, its readability, and how it allows me to solve complex problems with clean and expressive code. I build RESTful APIs, automate processes, handle data, and deploy solutions on AWS, always striving for technical excellence. But what truly drives me is discipline, perseverance, and teamwork. A scout at heart, lover of nature, swimming, and the gym, I believe a healthy body supports a creative mind. And when I'm not coding, I'm playing guitar or taking on some challenge that reminds me that with passion and consistency, anything is possible.

employment.title: Software Engineer
description: Developed Backend-for-Frontend (BFF) services for Hermes 2.0 integrating with legacy SOAP platform (Hermes 1.0).
Designed serverless architecture using Python, AWS Lambda, Lambda Layers, and SST (Infrastructure as Code).
Migrated serverless services to Docker-based microservices to eliminate cold start latency and meet fintech high-availability requirements.
Implemented AWS Step Functions for orchestration, Redis caching layer, S3 storage, and CloudWatch monitoring.
Maintained CI/CD pipelines ensuring secure and efficient deployment lifecycle.

employment.title: Backend Developer
description: Developed RESTful APIs using Flask with unit testing and BDD practices.
Designed PostgreSQL and MariaDB data models using SQLAlchemy and Alembic.
Integrated AWS services including Cognito, S3, Lambda, Aurora, DynamoDB, Step Functions, and Rekognition.
Built and deployed containerized applications using Docker.
Contributed to Java-based API services using Spring Boot and Swagger.

employment.title: Analyst & Developer
description: Analyzed requirements and developed scalable backend solutions.
Automated processes using Selenium (RPA).
Developed ETL processes using Pentaho.
Built Python services and automation bots.
Implemented API integrations and Flask web applications.

employment.title: Software Developer
description: Analyzed Oracle databases and generated executive financial reports.
Developed complex SQL queries, PL/SQL functions, and stored procedures.
Modeled transactional banking data and business rule abstraction.

employment.title: Software Developer
description: Designed and developed enterprise solutions using C# and .NET.
Created SQL Server schemas and complex stored procedures.
Developed WCF services and desktop interfaces with XAML.

employment.title: Architect & Software Developer
description: Led requirements analysis, project planning, and system implementation using Django.
Designed PostgreSQL schemas, triggers, and stored procedures.
Developed web interfaces using HTML5, JavaScript, and Bootstrap.
